title: Project Miner Temp Power Schedule Status Readiness Live Admission
authority_basis: Jason's 2026-05-18 standing PM blocker authority as repo technical authority and project stakeholder.
objective: Clear the post-assignment schedule/status blocker only as readiness status on imported Project Miner Temp Power task and apparatus rows, without opening schedule/date writes, workpackage status writes, durable field records, production tracking, customer reporting, or finance outputs.
preconditions: PM Lane 277 approval row reads back as approved_for_import_packet.
PM Lane 278 import reads back as imported with current_candidate_match=true and counts_match=true.
PM Lane 279 field authorization and assignment reads back as 184 assignments for 184 unique imported apparatus rows.
Hosted preflight readback showed 15 imported tasks, 184 imported apparatus, 7 imported workpackages, 184 assignments, and 0 issues.
Hosted schedule routes remained read-only context with 1 project, 4 tasks-with-scope, and 3 relationships.
The existing application registry admits task.start and apparatus.update_status; it does not provide an existing governed workpackage start route or schedule/date write route.
scope: Use existing POST /api/v1/mutations/tasks for imported Temp Power tasks only.
Use existing POST /api/v1/mutations/apparatus for imported Temp Power apparatus only.
Use lead actor role, online source, mutation class B, and deterministic idempotency keys.
Set task and apparatus status to ready.
Add Lane 280 metadata that records schedule/status readiness authority and preserves downstream not_admitted authorities.
not_allowed: No customer report, completion evidence, or customer commitment.
No billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance output.
No source workbook or PDF writeback.
No new service, DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
No autonomous AI business-state mutation beyond the task/apparatus readiness writes explicitly admitted here.
validation_plan: Hosted readback for tasks, apparatus, workpackages, assignments, issues, PM workfront, project-import-status, and schedule read-only routes.
Hosted idempotency replay for all 15 task status requests and all 184 apparatus status requests.

corepack pnpm --dir "C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform" --filter @apex/operations-web exec node scripts/smoke-pm-intake-hosted.mjs --operations-web-base-url https://operations.apexpowerops.com --mutation-seam-base-url https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com --timeout-ms 20000
corepack pnpm --dir "C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform" --filter @apex/operations-web exec node scripts/smoke-hosted-routes.mjs --base-url https://operations.apexpowerops.com
validation_result: PASS: hosted readback returned 15 ready tasks, 184 ready apparatus, 7 not_started workpackages, 184 assignments, 0 issues, PM workfront ready_count=184 and unassigned_count=0, import status imported/current_candidate_match/counts_match all true, schedule read-only counts unchanged, downstream authority bad counts were 0, replay returned 15 task idempotent_hit and 184 apparatus idempotent_hit, deployed mutation-seam smoke returned RESULT PASS, hosted PM intake smoke returned PM_INTAKE_HOSTED_SUMMARY failed=0, and hosted operations routes smoke returned SMOKE_SUMMARY failed=0 passed=12.
